issue_title: Editor removes unintendedly sections from about-iota/data-transfer page
issue_body_preview:
**Describe the bug**
On the _about-iota/data-transfer_ page I wanted to add a missing wiki-link to _iota/streams_ using the wiki editor. The wiki editor did several additional unintended changes. For example a table section has been removed. As there are more sections removed my guess is that the e
test_description_zh: 访问 about-iota/data-transfer 页面，检查页面内容是否完整渲染，特别关注页面中的表格部分以及各个内容章节是否全部正常显示。
expected_result_zh: about-iota/data-transfer 页面应完整显示所有内容章节，包括表格部分在内的所有区块均正常渲染，无内容缺失或被意外移除的情况。
